onboarding.title: Welcome to Kanban
onboarding.subtitle: Organize tasks into workflow columns
onboarding.sampleDataDescription: We've set up 5 columns and 3 sample cards so you can see how it works.

steps.title: Create cards
steps.description: Add tasks with titles, priorities, due dates, and labels. Each card is its own JSON file.

steps.title: Move across columns
steps.description: Drag cards through workflow stages — Backlog, To Do, In Progress, Review, and Done.

steps.title: Use your AI agent
steps.description: Ask your agent to add tasks, move cards, or show you what's due this week.

reference.overview: A visual task board with customizable columns and drag-and-drop card management. Perfect for tracking projects, sprints, or personal to-dos.

concepts.name: Cards
concepts.description: Individual tasks with title, priority, due date, assignee, and labels. Stored as separate JSON files in the cards/ directory.

concepts.name: Columns
concepts.description: Workflow stages that cards move through. Defined in a single columns.json file — add or reorder stages anytime.

prompts: Add these tasks to my board: design homepage, write docs, set up CI
Move all high-priority cards to the In Progress column
Show me all cards due this week
Create a new column called 'Blocked' between In Progress and Review
tips: Cards are stored as individual JSON files in the cards/ directory — easy to create or edit directly
Columns are defined in columns.json — you can add custom workflow stages or change colors
Use labels to categorize cards across columns (e.g., 'bug', 'feature', 'docs')

card.title: No cards yet
card.description: Create your first task to get started with your Kanban board.
card.suggestedPrompt: Add a task: design the homepage, high priority, due Friday
